note: Capture rows added by later hardware plans. Keep raw/HCI/decompile blobs in ignored .evidence/phase1 paths; commit sanitized manifest pointers only.

action: input_device_scan baseline with gun powered or pairable
origin: android-diagnostic logcat InputDevice scan
expected_interpretation: Record whether the gun appears as an Android InputDevice; unavailable is an explicit outcome, not proof of no protocol.

action: ble_scan for fff0 service and fff1 fff3 fff5 characteristic candidates
origin: android-diagnostic BLE scan logcat plus optional HCI bugreport
expected_interpretation: Record visible BLE services/chars, permission denial, scan failure, or no candidate service honestly.

action: classic_scan for paired device UUIDs SPP and channel-1 socket candidates
origin: android-diagnostic Classic Bluetooth logcat plus optional HCI bugreport
expected_interpretation: Record bonded device, SPP/channel observations, socket bytes, timeout, permission denial, or unavailable state.

action: Android phone sees iPega device but direct pairing does not complete and appears to require custom handshake
origin: human checkpoint response; Android phone connected over USB; no Gradle build/install approval; no diagnostic APK log
expected_interpretation: Direct settings pairing is unavailable as a proof path; custom BLE or Classic handshake remains a hypothesis, with no successful input or rumble evidence claimed.

action: adb shell dumpsys input after direct pairing failure
origin: USB ADB no-build dumpsys; Bluetooth Settings focused on scan/pairing dialog
expected_interpretation: Current Event Hub devices did not include an external gun/gamepad InputDevice; custom app-level protocol remains possible and control evidence remains uncaptured.

action: adb shell dumpsys bluetooth_manager after ARGunGame direct pairing attempt
origin: USB ADB no-build dumpsys; sanitized ARGunGame pairing evidence
expected_interpretation: Android sees ARGunGame and briefly links, but bond returns NONE after BONDING and BLE link drops with no client app; service/characteristic discovery remains pending.

action: adb shell dumpsys bluetooth_manager bonded-device and bond-event review
origin: USB ADB no-build dumpsys; sanitized ARGunGame pairing evidence
expected_interpretation: ARGunGame was not left bonded after Settings pairing failure; Classic SPP/socket proof remains pending.

action: approved Gradle build and adb install of com.btgun.diagnostic
origin: human-approved dependency checkpoint; gradle assembleDebug with ANDROID_HOME and temporary GRADLE_USER_HOME; adb install -r succeeded
expected_interpretation: Diagnostic APK is available for hardware capture; this is tooling evidence only and does not prove input protocol or rumble.

action: diagnostic InputDevice scan after successful APK install
origin: com.btgun.diagnostic logcat permission_state and input_device_scan reports
expected_interpretation: Diagnostic app still saw only built-in Android input devices; custom BLE/Classic app-level protocol remains possible and control evidence remains uncaptured.

action: diagnostic BLE scan with physical ARGunGame powered and visible
origin: com.btgun.diagnostic logcat ble_scan reports; committed docs sanitize address prefix FFFF10
expected_interpretation: Physical ARGunGame advertises service 0000fff0-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb; characteristic discovery, notifications, controls, and rumble remain pending until GATT connection evidence exists.

action: diagnostic Classic bonded-device scan after direct pairing failure
origin: com.btgun.diagnostic classic_scan reports plus bluetooth_manager after diagnostic
expected_interpretation: ARGunGame was not bonded as a Classic device; no gun SPP UUID, channel-1 socket, or Classic bytes were captured.

action: diagnostic BLE GATT connect, service discovery, candidate reads, and notification enable
origin: com.btgun.diagnostic ble_gatt logcat reports; committed docs sanitize address prefix FFFF10
expected_interpretation: ARGunGame accepts app-level BLE connection without OS pairing; fff0 has fff1 read|notify, fff3 read|notify, and fff5 read|write. Control semantics and rumble remain unverified until targeted captures and fixtures exist.

action: mixed physical control window after fff3 notification enable
origin: com.btgun.diagnostic ble_gatt_characteristic_changed reports from fff3; no per-control timing labels captured
expected_interpretation: fff3 emits ASCII control-like notifications including ARGun KeyPressed, B8DOWN/UP, B4DOWN/UP, and B6DOWN; exact trigger/reload/joystick/X/Y/A/B mapping remains pending targeted physical captures.

action: trigger down/up
origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent MotionEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record trigger down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome; do not mark verified before normalized fixture linkage.

action: reload down/up
origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent MotionEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record reload down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome; long-hold recenter belongs to later Android host work.

action: joystick X/Y axes neutral min max and release
origin: android-diagnostic MotionEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record axis movement semantics or explicit no-axis/no-frame outcome.

action: X button down/up
origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record X button down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome.

action: Y button down/up
origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record Y button down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome.

action: A button down/up
origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record A button down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome.

action: B button down/up
origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record B button down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome.

action: bounded BLE fff5 rumble candidate attempt after input path evidence exists
origin: android-diagnostic rumble_attempt logcat plus optional HCI bugreport
expected_interpretation: Record observed physical motor activation, ack/fail, no-motor, permission denial, or unavailable state; failed attempts do not satisfy DISC-06.

action: bounded Classic SPP rumble candidate attempt after Classic input evidence exists
origin: android-diagnostic rumble_attempt logcat plus optional HCI bugreport
expected_interpretation: Record observed physical motor activation, ack/fail, no-motor, permission denial, or unavailable state; failed attempts do not satisfy DISC-06.
